name: revit_export_wall_parts_dxf
description: Export selected wall parts from a 3D parts-only view to individual DXF files for CNC fabrication.

part_ids.description: Element ids of wall-derived Part elements to export

output_folder.description: Directory path for exported DXF files

view_id.description: Optional 3D view id; defaults to the active view

notes: Replace FolderBrowserDialog and PickObjects with part_ids and output_folder arguments. Requires PartsVisibility.ShowPartsOnly and initialized CncFab shared parameters.
